L1.area: SBI request processing and subscriber context management

L2.description: A nil interface conversion vulnerability exists in the authentication service's request handling logic. When processing an authentication request, the code attempts to perform a type assertion on an interface value without first verifying it is non-nil. A remote attacker can trigger a panic and crash the service by sending a crafted request that causes a lookup for a non-existent internal mapping, resulting in a complete denial of service.

L3.area: SBI request processing and subscriber context management
L3.description: A nil interface conversion vulnerability exists in the authentication service's request handling logic. When processing an authentication request, the code attempts to perform a type assertion on an interface value without first verifying it is non-nil. A remote attacker can trigger a panic and crash the service by sending a crafted request that causes a lookup for a non-existent internal mapping, resulting in a complete denial of service.

ground_truth.reason: The UeAuthPostRequestProcedure function performs interface type assertions on values retrieved from internal context maps without nil checks, causing a panic when a crafted authentication request references non-existent subscriber identity mappings.
